description: Request body to dispatch an async remediation run (POST /v1/audit/remediations, audit_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). 'audit_run_id' is required — remediations are always anchored to a specific audit run.

audit_run_id.description: UUID of the completed audit run that produced the findings to remediate.

mode.description: Remediation strategy. 'safe' restricts to low-risk fixes; 'aggressive' allows higher-impact changes.

write.description: When false (default), output diff only. When true, apply changes to disk.

requested_by.description: Caller identifier recorded on the run row. Defaults to 'api'.
